title: Run CLI Command
description: Run a bounded shell command inside a bubblewrap sandbox rooted at the active AI working directory. Read-only inspection commands run automatically; touchy or mutating operations such as rm, redirects, chmod, mv, git reset, and network-enabled commands require approval first.

command.description: Shell command to run from the active AI working directory inside the sandbox.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum runtime in milliseconds. Defaults to 15000.

max_output_chars.description: Maximum combined stdout/stderr characters to retain before stopping the command. Defaults to 20000.

allow_network.description: Allow network access inside the sandbox. Defaults to false and always requires approval when true.

selection.summary: Run sandboxed shell commands from the current AI working directory with approval for risky operations.
selection.whenToUse: Use when the task needs local command output such as listing, build/test status, git inspection, code search, or other bounded shell diagnostics from the active workspace. Change the working directory first when relative command paths should run somewhere else.
selection.whenNotToUse: Do not use for file edits that fit the filesystem edit tool, long-running services, interactive programs, unsandboxed host access, or network commands unless the user approves network access.
